evals.expected_output: Scan all 40_Wiki notes, categorize by review status (overdue/due today/never reviewed/upcoming/mastered/scheduled), present a formatted queue table with counts and up to 10 ready-for-review notes sorted by priority, then ask user to choose full or quick mode.

Read the Bethe-Bloch Formula note, check/add review frontmatter, then start Phase 1 (Feynman Check) by asking user to explain the concept. After simulated user response, generate 5 adversarial questions (2 trick, 2 cross-concept using wikilinks from the note, 1 exam-style).

Read the Vector_Spaces note, check/add review frontmatter, then generate 3 quick questions (1 core definition/fact, 1 application/context, 1 cross-link referencing a wikilink from the note). Present all 3 at once.
